qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: Suppose two hosts are connected by a point-to-point link and they are configured to use protocol for reliable data transfer. Identify in which one of the following scenarios, the utilization of the link is the lowest. A. Longer link length and lower transmission rate B. Longer link length and higher

qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: A channel has a bit rate of and one-way propagation delay of . The channel uses stop and wait protocol. The transmission time of the acknowledgment frame is negligible. To get a channel efficiency of at least , the minimum frame size should be A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: On a wireless link, the probability of packet error is . A stop-and-wait protocol is used to transfer data across the link. The channel condition is assumed to be independent of transmission to transmission. What is the average number of transmission attempts required to transfer packets? A. B. C. D
